name: Ari Matti
bio: Ari Matti Mustonen is an Estonian-born stand-up comedian known for a high-energy, observational style. After headlining record-setting tours in Estonia, he built a following in the United States as a regular on the live comedy podcast Kill Tony and through an appearance on The Joe Rogan Experience.

timeline.ev: Estonian tour HUPPA sells over 13,000 tickets
Appears on The Joe Rogan Experience

accolades: Regular on the Kill Tony live comedy podcast
